posts.text:
Happy birthday to you too.


Kristine Satkosky (@satkosky)

@BretBaier love your show today is my birthday I’m 49



— https://nitter.net/satkosky/status/2031869056777650358#m
Our panel last night broke down their thoughts on the DHS stalled funding and the effects it’s having on TSA #specialreport #tsa
Mt. Kilauea has erupted for the 43rd time since December 2024 #news #hawaii
Last night our panel shared their thoughts on President Trumps handling of Operation Epic Fury on #specialreport
A little clip from my exclusive interview with CEO of BlackRock Larry Fink #specialreport #interview
Be sure to tune in soon and catch my exclusive interview with Larry Fink on #specialreport
Great to be on @americareports today, thank you for having me!
Got big day today, doing the show from New York and an exclusive interview with Larry Fink. Be sure to tune in tonight 6PM ET on @Fox News
Thank you for tuning in tonight and sending in all your questions #tiktoktuesday #specialreport
Some #SpecialReport history today and background on how our common ground segment came to be. Tune in every weeknight to Special Report on @Fox News

It’s that time of the week again! #tiktoktuesday be sure to send me your questions and I will answer them live on #specialreport tonight. You can also stitch this video and send in a video response. Be sure to tune in tonight 6PM ET on @Fox News
